appraisal_events.evidence: « j’entendis appeler duc de Châtellerault un petit vieillard aux moustaches argentées d’ambassadeur, dans lequel seul un petit bout de regard resté le même me permit de reconnaître le jeune homme… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Châtellerault as unrecognizable, now a "little old man", which operates a clear diminishment of his figure compared to the "young man" of the past.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, Châtellerault is lowered by the description of his striking aging and the difficulty in recognizing him.
